== Notes for [[Item:Q117499|Q117499]] ==

-https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gon%C3%A7alo_Viegas_de_Portocarreiro

José Augusto de Sotto Mayor Pizarro, Linhagens Medievais Portuguesas - 3 vols, Universidade Moderna, 1ª Edição, Porto, 1999. vol. 2-pg. 202 e vol. 2-pg. 324.


------------



Not known son of https://www.geni.com/people/Gomes-de-Portocarreiro-o-Peixoto/6000000013886283589
(also as per written info-about)
cutted & added wiki PT parents

-------






----------
Cavaleiro fidalgo.

http://roglo.eu/roglo?lang=pt;i=2421721

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
